title: What is Bending Spoons? The little-known AOL and Vimeo owner that’s now public
summary: Bending Spoons, which owns AOL and Vimeo, has recently gone public despite remaining largely unknown to the general public. The company's portfolio of products has reached over a billion users globally, making its public debut significant for the media and technology industry.
content: Bending Spoons remains largely unknown, even as its portfolio of products has served more than a billion people.

zh.title: Bending Spoons是什么？这家不为人知的AOL和Vimeo所有者现已上市
zh.summary: 拥有AOL和Vimeo的Bending Spoons最近上市，尽管在普通大众中仍然鲜为人知。该公司的产品组合已在全球拥有超过10亿用户，使其上市对媒体和科技产业具有重要意义。

title: Vizio accidentally made the best dumb TV on the market
summary: Vizio has released a 65-inch Mini LED Quantum TV priced under $398, making it the cheapest quantum-dot TV on the market. The standout feature is that it functions excellently as a "dumb TV," offering high-quality hardware without requiring the smart TV features.
content:
Vizio OS works well, but you don’t even need to use it.	

When I first started testing Vizio's 65-inch Mini LED Quantum TV, I thought the big story was that Vizio was back and that it had a quantum-dot TV for under $398 - the cheapest on the market. Vizio's been pretty quiet since it was acquired by Walmart in 2024, so putting out a TV with quantum dots, which allow for higher brightness levels and more accurate color, at a budget price seemed like a strong comeback.
But that's not the big story. While those two points are intriguing, the big news about the Mini LED Quantum TV is that Vizio accidentally made the best dumb TV on the market.
Vizio Mini LED Quantum TV

Where to Buy:

 $398 at Walmart ( …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Vizio意外打造了市场上最好的"非智能电视"
zh.summary: Vizio推出了一款65英寸Mini LED量子电视，价格低于398美元，成为市场上最便宜的量子点电视。突出特点是它作为"非智能电视"表现出色，提供高质量硬件而无需智能电视功能。

title: Almost 90 new unicorns have been minted so far this year — here they are
summary: Nearly 90 startups have achieved unicorn status so far this year, driven by an investor frenzy fueled by AI developments. The rapid pace of unicorn creation reflects increased venture capital activity and growing valuations in the startup ecosystem.
content: With AI igniting an investor frenzy, more startups are achieving unicorn status every month.

zh.title: 今年迄今已诞生近90家新独角兽——它们在这里
zh.summary: 今年迄今已有近90家初创公司达到独角兽地位，由AI发展带动的投资者热潮所驱动。独角兽创造的快速步伐反映了风险投资活动的增加和初创生态系统中估值的增长。

title: Xbox is a disaster
summary: The article examines the troubled state of Xbox and the broader video game industry, using Microsoft's Summer Game Fest showcase as a case study. Despite the company's presentation of major titles like Halo and Gears of War, the piece highlights structural challenges facing the gaming sector.
content:
Gears of War: E-Day.	

This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the bleak state of the video game industry, follow Andrew Webster. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes on Sunday at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
Microsoft closed out Summer Game Fest with a bang. The company's annual June showcase was packed with crowd-pleasers: Halo, Gears of War, Fable, a translucent Xbox, and even some pleasant surprises like new Persona and Crazy Taxi games. It was the kind of event that harkened back to the boisterous days of E3, when the industry was in a healthier place an …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox陷入困境
zh.summary: 这篇文章以微软Summer Game Fest展会为案例研究，审视了Xbox和更广泛的电子游戏行业的困难状况。尽管公司展示了《光环》和《战争机器》等主要游戏，但这篇文章强调了游戏部门面临的结构性挑战。

title: Chemical accidents rise as Trump administration proposes weakening safety rules
summary: Chemical accidents have risen sharply, with injuries and fatalities from chemical incidents increasing nearly 50 percent in recent years. The Trump administration's proposal to weaken safety regulations raises concerns about further increases in workplace and environmental hazards.
content: Chemicals from accidents that injured or killed people increased by nearly 50 percent in recent years.

zh.title: 化工事故增加 特朗普政府提议削弱安全规则
zh.summary: 近年来化学事故大幅增加，化学事故造成的伤亡人数增加近50%。特朗普政府削弱安全法规的提议引发了人们对工作场所和环保灾害进一步增加的担忧。

title: The missing 500 million: Cosmic bombardment melted Earth's first crust
summary: A new study suggests that cosmic bombardment, rather than just internal heat, may have melted Earth's early crust during the Hadean period. This discovery helps explain a previously mysterious gap in the geological record from Earth's formation.
content: The heat of the Hadean may have come from impacts as well as the interior.

zh.title: 失踪的5亿：宇宙轰击融化了地球最初的地壳
zh.summary: 一项新研究表明，在冥古宙时期，宇宙轰击而非仅内部热量可能融化了地球早期的地壳。这一发现有助于解释地球形成时期地质记录中之前神秘的空白。
